data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of confirming each checklist item with a timestamp. However, while the linked use case mentions that a timestamp is recorded when a patient checks off 'watched video', there is no evidence provided that confirms timestamps are recorded for all checklist items. This indicates a gap in the evidence as it does not comprehensively cover the requirement for confirmation of each item with a timestamp.
gaps: No evidence that timestamps are recorded for all checklist items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
